mapper.sql: u.id, u.account, u.password, u.user_name AS userName, u.phone, CASE u.sex WHEN 0 THEN '男' WHEN 1 THEN '女' END AS sexName, u.sex AS sex, u.description, DATE_FORMAT(u.create_time ,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS createTime
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id
AND ur.role_id = #{roleId}

SELECT u.id AS userId, u.user_name AS userName, u.password AS password, ur.role_id AS roleId, uc.class_id AS classId FROM `user` u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN user_class uc ON u.id = uc.user_id
u.account = #{account}
